response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the English dialogue and the song lyrics provided in the Reference JSON for the latter part of the video. Scene 1 contains extensive dialogue between Hakos Baelz and Ninomae Ina'nis which I have transcribed and synchronized to the audio. Scene 2 features on-screen text for character introductions which I have captured. Scene 3 contains the song 'ALL FOR ONE'; the lyrics match the reference and are timed precisely to the vocals. I ensured no early cutoffs and followed the 'violet' correction as dictated by the audio.
